name: Turnkey
description: Wallet infrastructure and key management API using secure enclaves for crypto and fintech apps.

seo.title: Turnkey — Identity / Auth / User Management
seo.meta_description: Turnkey: Wallet infrastructure and key management API using secure enclaves for crypto and fintech apps.

when_to_use: Secure enclave key management API for crypto fintech apps
Wallet infrastructure with policy-based signing controls
Multi-party approval workflow for institutional asset custody
Embedded wallet provisioning for fintech user onboarding
Hardware-backed key storage for payment application signing

pros: Secure-enclave key management with policy engine
Low-latency signing suitable for high-throughput apps
cons: Primitive-heavy; you build UX on top yourself
Learning curve around organizations and policies
review.verdict: Great low-level key infra for teams that want control and speed without running HSMs themselves.
review.best_for: Fintech and crypto infra teams building custom wallet UX on top
review.not_for: Product teams wanting a ready-made end-user wallet SDK
